---
title: "test_forge_gungnir_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_forge_gungnir_empire.py"
loc: 30
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.75
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.38
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestForgeGungnirCalculus, gungnir. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.gungnir.universal](file://src.core.engine.gungnir.universal)

### Exports
- `TestForgeGungnirCalculus`
- `gungnir`
- `test_forge_detects_claustrophobic_python`
- `test_forge_detects_top_heavy_python`
- `test_forge_detects_ugly_react`
- `test_forge_passes_beautiful_code`
- `test_forge_passes_symmetric_react`
